# oidc-secret-custom-name

OIDC clientSecretRef with non-argocd-secret name documents CR->CM limitation via error diagnostic

!!! tip "Direction: `to`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `to` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/to/oidc-secret-custom-name` |

## Input

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    oidc:
      name: Okta
      issuerURL: https://dev-123456.okta.com
      clientID: aaaabbbbccccddddeee
      clientSecretRef:
        name: custom-oidc-secret
        key: clientSecret
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cr->cm
  key: oidc.config
  message: clientSecretRef secret "custom-oidc-secret" cannot be represented in argocd-cm
    oidc.config (only argocd-secret keys via $string are supported)
  severity: error
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
```
